description: over-representation analysis (Enrichr/Fisher) on a gene hit list -> results CSV + dotplot
rules: read-only — no inputs are mutated; outputs only under record_store
gene symbols are cleaned + deduped (human UPPER, mouse Title-case) before testing
FDR filter uses Adjusted P-value (Benjamini-Hochberg), computed within each library
needs gseapy + network for Enrichr; absent/offline the porter emits a degraded report so the contract holds
usage: Set GENES (hit list: one symbol per line or CSV first column). Optional: LIBRARIES (space-separated Enrichr names / GMT paths), ORGANISM (default human), FDR (default 0.05), BACKGROUND (custom universe file). Outputs: ora_results.csv, ora_significant.csv, ora_dotplot.png.
limitation: Read-only over-representation only; never runs GSEA. Enrichr uses a fixed background unless BACKGROUND is supplied. Requires gseapy installed and network access to Enrichr for real results.
